case_title: KOHN, ALICIA vs. SCHEAR, HARLEY E. M.D. A MEDICAL CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHN, ALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEAR, HARLEY E. M.D. A MEDICAL CORP.
